name: Little Jam Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until thick.
2. Gradually add sugar, vanilla, and lemon juice to the yolks, beating constantly.
3. Sift flour and salt into a separate bowl.
4. Alternately fold in sifted ingredients with melted butter.
5. Gently fold in stiffly beaten egg whites until just combined.
6. Line muffin pans (16 large or 24 small) with paper liners.
7. Fill each muffin cup with a spoonful of batter and a heaping teaspoon of jam.
8. Cover with remaining batter.
9. Bake at 350°F for 15 to 25 minutes, depending on the size of the cakes.
10. These make a delicious dessert or snack that can be packed in lunchboxes.
